meaning: n.摩门教徒,一夫多妻主义者
examples: The Book of Mormon is playing at the Eugene O'Neill Theatre in New York, NY.
I know the Book of Mormon is true, Grandpa. Every part of me bears this witness.
The staff noticed a striking difference between the wing colorings of the freshly hatched great Mormon butterfly.
He is the first Mormon from a major party to contest the presidential election.
Perhaps more surprising, Mr. Romney's Mormon religion doesn't seem to be turning off evangelical voters.
